summary: Admin Statistics Tab and Pause/Resume Testing Complete. All 16 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working including new Statistics tab with charts, model breakdown, toggle functionality, and per-category table.

issues: Recharts console warnings about width/height(-1) during initial render - charts still display correctly after container sizes stabilize

backend: GET /api/admin/timeseries returns daily series with papers, matches, tokens, cost
GET /api/admin/timeseries includes per-category breakdown for all 5 categories
GET /api/admin/progress includes tournament_paused and global_paused fields
GET /api/admin/progress includes goal1, goal2, goals_met tracking
GET /api/admin/tournaments returns list of 5 tournaments with stats and goals
GET /api/admin/stats returns model breakdown with cost_total per model
GET /api/admin/stats totals include input_tokens, output_tokens, total_cost
frontend: Statistics tab is default tab on admin panel
4 summary cards shown: Total Papers (300), Total Matches (12,199), Total Tokens (25.4M), Total Cost ($102.28)
Cost by Model section shows all 3 models: claude-opus-4-5, gpt-5.2, gemini-3-pro-preview
Cumulative/Daily toggle works - switches between area and bar charts
System/By Category toggle works - switches between single-line and stacked views
Per-Category Totals table appears when 'By Category' selected
All 4 charts render correctly: Papers, Matches, Tokens, Cost
Controls tab shows category tabs, progress indicator, fetch/compare buttons
Controls tab progress indicator shows 'TOURNAMENT PAUSED' status
Tournaments tab lists all 5 tournaments with pause/resume buttons
All 8 admin tabs navigable: Statistics, Controls, Settings, Prompt, Experiment, Suggestions, Users, Tournaments

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Recharts ResponsiveContainer shows console warnings during initial render when dimensions are -1, but self-corrects. Consider adding minWidth/minHeight props to prevent warnings.
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing production data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 verified the Admin Statistics tab transformation. Key features tested: (1) New Statistics tab is default with 4 summary cards and 4 charts, (2) Timeseries API returns daily data for Feb 6-9 2026 with per-category breakdowns, (3) Progress API now includes tournament_paused and global_paused fields for pause state consistency, (4) All tournaments show paused status with Resume buttons, (5) Controls tab (formerly Overview) still works with category tabs, progress indicator, and fetch/compare buttons. All 5 categories (cs.DC, cs.RO, econ.GN, physics.comp-ph, q-bio.BM) have paused tournaments.
